hero_title: Smarter Farming, Better Yields with Agroweather
hero_subtitle: Your all-in-one solution for AI-powered crop recommendations, instant disease detection, and expert farming advice.
feature1_desc: Get the best crop suggestions based on your farm's unique soil, weather, and climate conditions.
feature2_desc: Upload a leaf image and instantly identify potential diseases, helping you act faster to protect your crops.
feature3_desc: Have a question? Our AI-powered chatbot provides instant answers on farming practices, pests, and more.
why1_desc: Users report an average yield increase of up to 25% by choosing the optimal crops for their land.
why2_desc: Optimize water and fertilizer usage by planting suitable crops, saving resources and costs.
why3_desc: Early disease detection helps prevent widespread damage, securing your harvest and income.
